title: Vanilla Axolotl Bucket CIT
description: This pack changes the texture of the Axolotl Bucket According to the color of axolotl in the bucket
body:
## This pack changes the texture of the Axolotl Bucket According to the Color of Axolotl in the bucket
**NO OPTIFINE REQUIRED! Just Vanilla 1.21.5**

![Ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0839061e08ab062a154e139090f06943c3b5bd2c.png)

![In Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81a2200610a32ab144304a2d6d5421ec4acf866b.png)

**How to install:**
- Go to the escape menu and press "Options"
- Then press "Resource Packs"
- In here, press "Open Pack Folder" This should open a folder.
- Drag and drop the resource pack in that folder
- The resource pack should now be available in the menu
